headline: Assessing Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Domino's Pizza at around US$373 a share still offers value, this breakdown will help you see how the current price compares with several valuation checks. The stock has fallen 7.0% over the last week, 2.5% over the last month, and 12.2% year to date, with a 17.7% decline over the last year. This is despite 3 year and 5 year returns of 25.3% and 7.2% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on how the company is positioned within the broader consumer services...

headline: GLP-1 drugs are changing how Americans eat. Food companies are racing to catch up
summary: For restaurants and food companies, the increasing adoption of GLP-1 drugs present both an opportunity and a threat to their businesses.
